evidence_quotes.quote: One area I hope you will consider including is the preservation of purchased video games.
In recent years, more and more games have been made unplayable after sale due to server shutdowns or online requirements.

paragraphs.text: Hello, and thank you for giving citizens a chance to share their thoughts on the Digital Fairness Act. I think this is a very important step toward protecting consumers in the digital space. One area I hope you will consider including is the preservation of purchased video games. In recent years, more and more games have been made unplayable after sale due to server shutdowns or online requirements. This leaves people with nothing, even if they paid full price or spent money on extra content. I believe that when we buy a product, it should remain accessible. Companies should not be allowed to take away something we already paid for. I hope the Digital Fairness Act can help address this and bring more balance to the relationship between consumers and digital service providers.
